ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly states 'Trunks' Time Machine'; Vision confirms dome-shaped Capsule Corporation pod with figure of matching description. Named artifact — not an unnamed prop.

trivia_bullets.text: Union Force (DBS-B02) is the second main booster set of the Dragon Ball Super Card Game, released November 3, 2017. [dbs-cardgame.com product page]

The Time Machine was engineered by Future Bulma in the alternate future timeline where the Androids devastated Earth. She built it in a secret underground basement beneath Capsule Corporation. [Dragon Ball Wiki: Time Machine, via WebSearch snippet]
sources: Dragon Ball Wiki: Time Machine, via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: The inscription 'HOPE!!' is painted on the machine's side. The manga (Volume 16, chapter 358, Viz translation) attributes it to Future Trunks himself ('I wrote this the day I left'); the anime dub credits Future Bulma. The discrepancy is documented at Kanzenshuu. [Kanzenshuu forum thread 'Who actually wrote HOPE!! on the Time Machine', via WebSearch snippet]
sources: Kanzenshuu forum: 'Who actually wrote HOPE!! on the Time Machine', via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: The machine is a Capsule Corporation artifact — Capsule Corp supplies all vehicle and equipment technology in the Dragon Ball universe, founded by Dr. Brief and carried forward in the future timeline by Future Bulma. [Dragon Ball Wiki: Capsule Corporation, via WebSearch snippet]
sources: Dragon Ball Wiki: Capsule Corporation, via WebSearch snippet

related_cards.name: Future Trunks
related_cards.note: The machine's user; Future Trunks travels to the past to warn the Z Warriors

related_cards.name: Future Bulma
related_cards.note: Engineer of the Time Machine; the apparatus-of-extraction labor anchor for this artifact
